evidence: SchedulingDecision has reason field; match_resources, preempt_if_needed, release_resources all return reason strings
FairnessEngine.detect_starvation (6 thresholds), StarvationHandler.priority_boost + fallback, AllocationStateMachine.guard_preempted (priority diff check)
All classes are per-instance; CompositionRoot creates fresh ResourceScheduler per root; no module-level mutable state
TopologyMapper.map_to_hardware scoring is pure + deterministic; FairnessEngine.compute_fair_share is deterministic
QuotaArbitrator.refund_on_failure clears usage; release_resources removes assignment
AllocationStateMachine PREEMPTED→QUEUED with guards; StarvationHandler.find_fallback after repeated starvation
AllocationStateMachine TERMINAL_STATES = {COMPLETED, FAILED, REJECTED}; no transitions allowed from terminal states
assign_worker returns True if worker already assigned; QuotaArbitrator.consume_usage returns existing usage on duplicate execution_id
BOOST_MAP: BATCH→LOW→NORMAL→HIGH; HIGH and CRITICAL do not boost further
AllocationStateMachine TRANSITIONS table enforces correct flow; guard_running checks worker_ready
QuotaPolicy defines soft_limit (warn) and hard_limit (reject); enforce_limit gates accordingly
QuotaType enum: EXECUTION, WORKER, GLOBAL; QuotaArbitrator.check_quota branches on type
